criteria.name: simple tuned external baseline learns fixed-pattern sanity task
criteria.note: Skipped if fixed_pattern is not part of this run.

criteria.name: paired confidence intervals produced for comparisons
CRA has a target-regime edge after baseline retuning
CRA has a surviving target regime versus retuned baselines
criteria.note: A surviving regime is robust versus tuned external median and not dominated by the best tuned external candidate.

summary.claim_boundary: Controlled software hyperparameter fairness audit; CRA locked, external candidates tuned; not hardware evidence and not proof of universal superiority.

fairness_contract.audit_rule: CRA setting is locked; external baselines receive the documented tuning budget below.
fairness_contract.baseline_version_under_audit: CRA evidence baseline v0.9 / locked CRA v0.8 delayed_lr_0_20 model setting
causal_rules: all candidates receive the same task stream for the same task seed and seed
all candidates predict before seeing the current evaluation label
delayed tasks update only when feedback_due_step matures
no candidate receives future labels, switch locations, reward signs, or privileged task metadata
CRA and all external candidates share train/evaluation windows and task masks
candidate selection is reported after the run rather than silently substituted into the task stream
fairness_contract.claim_boundary: Controlled software hyperparameter fairness audit only; not hardware evidence and not proof of universal superiority.

tier_summary.claim_boundary: Controlled software hyperparameter fairness audit; CRA locked, external candidates tuned; not hardware evidence and not proof of universal superiority.
